reviews.review_description: This game is false advertising because the pictures are fake and I thought I was going to fly an airline plane and no I didn't there's only three small airplanes and two of them cost money to get and that's such a SCAM I regret buying this I only had a little fun that's why I gave it an extra star this game is a two out of 10

This flight simulator VR game delivers an unbelievably immersive experience the best I’ve ever had in virtual reality! From the moment you strap into the cockpit, the attention to detail is stunning. The visuals are crisp, the flight physics feel incredibly realistic, and every control responds like you’re truly piloting the aircraft.
The store images are fake and so is the description.
Can't get the controls to work complete waste of time and money

Some controls and flight physics still feel a bit rough, but nothing game-breaking.
A few tweaks to handling and more parts would make it an even better experience.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the thoughtful feedback! We’re glad you see potential and appreciate your suggestions. We’re already working on improving controls, physics, and adding more parts in upcoming updates.

reviews.review_description: The graphics suck,the photos are fake, and finally the cockpit was the same for all of them

developer_response.body: Thanks for your feedback! We’re sorry the visuals and cockpit variety didn’t fully meet your expectations. In our latest update, we’ve improved the airplane controls for smoother, more realistic handling and added new planes with interactive cockpit. We’re also continuing to enhance overall graphics and will introduce more unique aircraft and cockpit designs in future updates. Your feedback helps us make the experience better—thanks for supporting the game!

reviews.review_description: Waste of money. Graphics horrendous, absolute rubbish game.

developer_response.body: We’re sorry to hear the game didn’t meet your expectations. We’ve recently improved the airplane controller for smoother, more realistic flight and added multiple new planes with interactive cockpits. We’re also actively enhancing graphics and overall performance based on player feedback. More updates are on the way to further improve visuals, realism, and the overall experience. Thank you for your feedback—it truly helps us make the game better!

Sorry to hear it felt unrealistic. We’ve recently upgraded the airplane controller to improve flight physics and make handling feel more authentic. We’ve also added multiple new planes with interactive cockpits to enhance realism. We’re continuing to improve visuals and overall flight experience, and your feedback helps us shape future updates. Thank you for sharing it!

Sorry the experience didn’t meet your expectations. We’ve recently upgraded the airplane controller for a more realistic flying experience and added multiple new planes with interactive cockpits. We’re also continuing to improve graphics and overall gameplay performance in future updates. Thanks for your honest feedback — it truly helps us improve the game.
